messages.subject: The R Journal, Vol. 4 Issue 1
messages.body_plain:
Dear All,

The first issue of the fourth volume of The R Journal is now available
at http://journal.r-project.org/current.html

Thanks to everyone involved.

Martyn Plummer
Editor-in-Chief
